visual_description: A close-up, profile shot focuses on a man with a serious and concerned expression. He is wearing a white collared shirt and is illuminated by a cool, greenish light against a dark, almost black background. To the right, the out-of-focus profile of another person is visible. In the top right corner, a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present. The camera remains static, holding the tight focus on the man's face. The audio consists of a low, rhythmic, and percussive sound. It has a tense and suspenseful quality, like a slow, deliberate beat from a ticking clock or a low-frequency electronic pulse. The sound creates a palpable sense of anticipation and unease, building a quiet but intense atmosphere. There is no dialogue or other background noise. The camera cuts to a similar close-up, profile shot of a different man. This man is balding, wears glasses, and appears to be speaking, with his mouth slightly open. He is also lit by the same cool, greenish light in a dark setting. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The camera is static, maintaining a tight focus on the man's face.
